summary: Implemented the full Core-First Anti-Hallucination plan end-to-end: hardened dynamic tool categorization and unknown-category permission handling; added completion evidence gate + TASK_COMPLETE enforcement logic; added bounded post-edit verification (read-back checks) in agent tool execution; upgraded context compaction with a grounded-facts ledger; tightened neural memory recall by min-score threshold and explicit unverified-hint framing; upgraded loop detection with canonicalized signatures and low-variation loop blocking; set run profile to balanced and run-pr profile to strict for the new gates; and added/updated tests covering modes, permissions, compaction, memory thresholding, and loop detection.
current_status: All plan todos are complete; TypeScript build passes and full test suite is green (22 files, 142 passed, 7 skipped).
